herbs.herb_desc: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow, is a popular herbal remedy that has been used for centuries to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation. The infusion made from its leaves and flowers is said to have antibacterial and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating issues such as bloating, cramps, and diarrhea. When consumed, yarrow infusion is believed to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation, making it a soothing addition to a bedtime routine.
